creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/commit/ef5b42bb347fe93076bf3ee815aae99dc592194b#diff-15a3fbff3ffaa42af07eb3f18e2dc60cfb71413ab8eb28d5b4b11019b8ba645fR405> looks OK. 

I guess, the URL in the line at <https://github.com/freebsd/pkg/blob/3c420fbebe1e7bc8c047490694baf0536dc11b00/docs/pkg.8#L440> should be styled in the same way. 

----

It's unfortunate that neither link is represented as a link under <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg&sektion=8&manpath=Ports#SEE_ALSO> and <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg&sektion=8&manpath=Ports#BUGS>, but I don't know whether that's beyond the scope of this issue.

(When I first paid attention to the mirror-related line under <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=pkg&sektion=8&manpath=Ports#SEE_ALSO>, I thought that the page was attempting to tell me the _result_ of seeking the closest mirror.)
